MUST: register_tutor() MUST use @transaction.atomic — MUST NOT allow partial user creation without profile (RNF-013)
register_tutor() MUST create User with user_type='tutor' (RF-002)
register_tutor() MUST populate User.country_code from country_code parameter (RF-002-B)
register_tutor() MUST create TutorProfile linked to User (RF-004)
register_tutor() MUST populate TutorProfile.city from geo_data when available (RF-018-A)
register_tutor() MUST populate TutorProfile.country from geo_data when available (RF-018-A)
register_tutor() MUST validate tutor age >= 18 when birth_date is provided — MUST return (False, None, error_msg) if age < 18 (RF-022)
register_tutor() MUST return tuple (bool, User|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: register_tutor() MUST NOT leave TutorProfile.city as default 'Milagro' when geo_data provides real city (RF-018-A)
register_tutor() MUST NOT leave TutorProfile.country as default 'Ecuador' when geo_data provides real country (RF-018-A)
register_tutor() MUST NOT allow tutor registration if age < 18 when birth_date provided (RF-022)
register_tutor() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views — MUST return (False, None, str(error)) (RNF-003)

MUST: register_client() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
register_client() MUST create User with user_type='client' (RF-002)
register_client() MUST populate User.country_code from country_code parameter (RF-002-B)
register_client() MUST create ClientProfile linked to User (RF-003)
register_client() MUST populate ClientProfile.city from geo_data when available (RF-018-B)
register_client() MUST populate ClientProfile.country from geo_data when available (RF-018-B)
register_client() MUST return tuple (bool, User|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: register_client() MUST NOT leave ClientProfile.city as default 'Milagro' when geo_data provides real city (RF-018-B)
register_client() MUST NOT leave ClientProfile.country as default 'Ecuador' when geo_data provides real country (RF-018-B)
register_client() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)

MUST: manage_tutor_subjects() MUST write selected subjects to TutorProfile.subjects_taught M2M field exclusively (RF-016-A)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST call subjects_taught.set() with Subject queryset obtained from form.cleaned_data['subjects_taught'] — MUST NOT pass raw form object to set() (RF-016-A, BUG-013)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST return tuple (bool, QuerySet|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST accept maximum 5 subjects per RF-004-A
MUST_NOT: manage_tutor_subjects() MUST NOT pass Subject model instances where IDs are expected — MUST use .set() with queryset directly (BUG-013)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST NOT write to subjects legacy M2M field (RF-016-A)
manage_tutor_subjects() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)

MUST: update_tutor_profile() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
update_tutor_profile() MUST return tuple (bool, TutorProfile|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: update_tutor_profile() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)

MUST: update_client_profile() MUST use @transaction.atomic (RNF-013)
update_client_profile() MUST return tuple (bool, ClientProfile|None, str|None) (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: update_client_profile() MUST NOT raise exceptions toward views (RNF-003)
